notes: Dvergr Lantern now appears in Build Pieces > Furniture > Materials (it's used 1x each by the Wall Lantern and Pole Lantern), and is correctly tagged as pickable from Dvergr structures in the Mistlands. Was being silently dropped by the build-mats rollup because the game classifies it as a Tool (Torch type), and the existing weapon-upgrade-chain filter was over-eager.
